title: Texture MC
description: This texture pack has shorted swords, shields, food , boxed ore texture and much more!
body:
# Texture MC

## Why use Texture MC?

There aren't any **Resource Packs** that has good **features** and supports **all versions**.

But **Texture MC** does **both!**

### It includes: 
### **Boxed ores** 
![A screenshot from minecraft. Different ores placed infront of you, but unlike to it's vanilla (normal minecraft) textures, it has a border around them. That is called "boxed ores".](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19abf16d1fe33e6a47d4c6273dde5169729d6df3.png)
### **Shorted tools** 
![A screenshot from minecraft. Different tools is showed to the user. A text at the bottom of the image "Before".](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/07f15789c68adf7bc6463a02968dfda67c1856fb.png)
![A screenshot from minecraft. Different tools is showed to the user. A text at the bottom of the image "After".](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/497cdb7dc4ddb9bdb1e5dd06f3f243e9c9dcee48.png)
### **Lower fire** and ** lower shield**.

Download it now for better textures.

## Features

This texture pack has:

1. **Shorter Tools**!
2. **Boxed Ores**!
3. **Lower Fire** and **Shield**!
4. **Smaller Food**!
5. **Shows Bow** and **Crossbow** Stages of fire!
6. **Transparent Pumking** and **Crystal**!

## Extra Info

**Have fun**!

**Support me** by **downloading it**!

If you got issues or questions **[join my discord server](https://discord.com/invite/ETTr37p38R)**!
